hero.sub: Hover over everyday moments and emotions to tint the surface with fragrance

overlay.title: Lingering Note
overlay.sub: Every emotion has blossomed into scent

lines.desc:
When we're sad, when we're happy, when we want to share how we feel — we write.
Even in a single diary entry, even in one short message, emotions are woven in.
Writing is the most honest record of how we express ourselves.

A single familiar scent can revive a forgotten moment.
Scent connects people to people, and for some, it becomes a language that expresses who they are more deeply than words ever could.

For a long time, researchers and creators have tried to link scent with emotion and sensation.
That body of work grew the fragrance industry, and today people discover identity and narrative in scent.
Scentive completes that link with data.

lines.text: Emotions become fragrance, preserved in data.
lines.desc:
Yet for so long, scent has been understood through intuition alone.
Scentive builds a precise database connecting emotion and scent by learning from tens of thousands of diary entries, public datasets, and the chemical properties of aroma molecules.

lines.text: Data becomes a vast map of scent.
lines.desc:
The ability to analyze what was once abstract scent through quantitative data — that itself is innovation.
Scentive's scent map starts from personal diaries and grows into an infrastructure applicable to anyone, in any context.

howItWorks.title: From daily emotions to your signature scent

steps.title: Write your diary
steps.desc:
Freely record what happened today and how you felt.
You can add emotion tags to capture the mood of the day.

steps.title: AI analyzes your emotions
steps.desc: From a month of diary entries, the AI extracts emotion, sensory, and adjective keywords and identifies patterns.

steps.title: Your scent recipe is created
steps.desc: The extracted keywords are matched against a database of 50 scent accords to compose your personal recipe of top, middle, and base notes.

steps.title: Archived as a scent report
steps.desc:
That month's fragrance is finalized and saved to your archive.
One by one, twelve perfume bottles are filled.

part1.heading:
Everyone has their own
signature scent of life
part1.body:
We discovered fragrance in someone's diary.
Memories bloom into scent, and emotions linger as smell.
So why have we only ever focused on sight and sound?
Smell is the most primal and most personal sense.
Scentive gives that sense a language for the very first time.
part1.accent: "Everyone deserves a scent that is uniquely their own."

editorialCards.title: Emotional Mapping
editorialCards.desc: We translate your emotional curves into scent notes.

editorialCards.title: Memory Synthesis
editorialCards.desc: We weave forgotten fragments of memory back together through fragrance.

editorialCards.title: Personal Signature
editorialCards.desc: We suggest a unique scent that best expresses who you are.

part2.heading:
When scent becomes data,
the world changes

visions.title: Hyper-personalized scent service
visions.desc:
The more emotional data you accumulate, the more refined your scent recipe becomes.
A fragrance that is one of a kind — yours alone.

visions.title: Psychotherapy & spatial design
visions.desc: A new methodology for designing spaces and experiences through emotion-scent mapping data.

visions.title: A fundamental sense for physical AI
visions.desc:
When digital AI understands smell, the world changes entirely.
Scentive is building that language.

part2.footerPrefix: Scentive is not just an app.
part2.footerStrong: It is the first data infrastructure for creating the language of scent.

appCta.sub: Start now, and in one month you'll receive your very first personal scent recipe.
